preferred_sources.use: Mechanism, perturbation, clinical association, and patient-level endpoint claims.
Exploratory expression, cell-state, and cohort-level association claims with accession and metadata lock.
Intervention, population, endpoint, status, and safety context.
Background only; do not use as sole support for mechanistic or prognostic final claims.

source_floor: Use stable identifiers, retrieval dates, cohort/sample metadata, and claim-scope notes for every final claim.
